name: comfyui-image-gen
description: Generate images using AI models via ComfyUI (auto-installed via comfy-cli). Automatically handles model and node setup. If nothing appears a couple of minutes after enabling, restart Claude Desktop.

tools.name: generate_illustrated_image
tools.description: Generate an anime/illustration image using the Anima model via ComfyUI

tools.name: generate_realistic_image
tools.description: Generate a realistic/general-purpose image via ComfyUI

tools.name: generate_custom_image
tools.description: Generate an image using a user-provided custom ComfyUI workflow

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Edit an image using a text prompt and a local file path

tools.name: fetch_result
tools.description: Fetch the result of an image generation that is still in progress

settings_notice.title: Configuration
settings_notice.description: Settings (models, artist styles, sampling steps, LoRAs, ComfyUI URL, custom workflows) are managed in the Comfy-Gen-MCP server window that opens after first run — look for its tray icon and click Settings. This field is unused.
